Params.Name: TargetArray
Params.Description: The array to add item to

Params.Name: NewItem
Params.Description: The item to add to the array

Return.Description: The index of the newly added item

Params.Name: TargetArray
Params.Description: The array to add item to

Params.Name: NewItem
Params.Description: The item to add to the array

Return.Description: The index of the newly added item, or INDEX_NONE if the item is already present in the array

Functions.Name: Array_Shuffle
Functions.Description: Shuffle (randomize) the elements of an array

Params.Name: TargetArray
Params.Description: The array to shuffle

Functions.Name: Array_Append
Functions.Description: Append an array to another array

Params.Name: TargetArray
Params.Description: The array to add the source array to

Params.Name: SourceArray
Params.Description: The array to add to the target array

Functions.Name: Array_Insert
Functions.Description: Insert item at the given index into the array.

Params.Name: TargetArray
Params.Description: The array to insert into

Params.Name: NewItem
Params.Description: The item to insert into the array

Params.Name: Index
Params.Description: The index at which to insert the item into the array

Functions.Name: Array_Remove
Functions.Description: Remove item at the given index from the array.

Params.Name: TargetArray
Params.Description: The array to remove from

Params.Name: IndexToRemove
Params.Description: The index into the array to remove from

Functions.Name: Array_RemoveItem
Functions.Description: Remove all instances of item from array.

Params.Name: TargetArray
Params.Description: The array to remove from

Params.Name: Item
Params.Description: The item to remove from the array

Return.Description: True if one or more items were removed

Functions.Name: Array_Clear
Functions.Description: Clear an array, removes all content

Params.Name: TargetArray
Params.Description: The array to clear

Params.Name: TargetArray
Params.Description: The array to resize

Params.Name: Size
Params.Description: The new size of the array

Functions.Name: Array_Length
Functions.Description: Get the number of items in an array

Params.Name: TargetArray
Params.Description: The array to get the length of

Functions.Name: Array_LastIndex
Functions.Description: Get the last valid index into an array

Params.Name: TargetArray
Params.Description: The array to perform the operation on

Return.Description: The last valid index of the array

Functions.Name: Array_Get
Functions.Description: Given an array and an index, returns a copy of the item found at that index

Params.Name: TargetArray
Params.Description: The array to get an item from

Params.Name: Index
Params.Description: The index in the array to get an item from

Return.Description: A copy of the item stored at the index

Functions.Name: Array_Set
Functions.Description: Given an array and an index, assigns the item to that array element

Params.Name: TargetArray
Params.Description: The array to perform the operation on

Params.Name: Index
Params.Description: The index to assign the item to

Params.Name: Item
Params.Description: The item to assign to the index of the array

Params.Name: bSizeToFit
Params.Description: If true, the array will expand if Index is greater than the current size of the array

Functions.Name: Array_Swap
Functions.Description:
Swaps the elements at the specified positions in the specified array
	 If the specified positions are equal, invoking this method leaves the array unchanged

Params.Name: TargetArray
Params.Description: The array to perform the operation on

Functions.Name: Array_Find
Functions.Description: Finds the index of the first instance of the item within the array

Params.Name: TargetArray
Params.Description: The array to search for the item

Params.Name: ItemToFind
Params.Description: The item to look for

Return.Description: The index the item was found at, or -1 if not found

Functions.Name: Array_Contains
Functions.Description: Returns true if the array contains the given item

Params.Name: TargetArray
Params.Description: The array to search for the item

Params.Name: ItemToFind
Params.Description: The item to look for

Return.Description: True if the item was found within the array

Functions.Name: FilterArray
Functions.Description: Filter an array based on a Class derived from Actor.

Params.Name: TargetArray
Params.Description: The array to filter from

Params.Name: FilterClass
Params.Description: The Actor sub-class type that acts as the filter, only objects derived from it will be returned.

Return.Description: An array containing only those objects which are derived from the class specified.

Functions.Name: SetArrayPropertyByName
Functions.Description: Not exposed to users. Supports setting an array property on an object by name.

Functions.Name: Array_IsValidIndex
Functions.Description: Tests if IndexToTest is valid, i.e. greater than or equal to zero, and less than the number of elements in TargetArray.

Params.Name: TargetArray
Params.Description: Array to use for the IsValidIndex test

Params.Name: IndexToTest
Params.Description: The Index, that we want to test for being valid

Return.Description: True if the Index is Valid, i.e. greater than or equal to zero, and less than the number of elements in TargetArray.
